lineage.Process: Append gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado NO_TEST "anp_codi "Código ANP" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,gdb.ryalis.MonitDeforAcum,anp_codi,-1,-1;md_fuente CalculateField MonitoreoDeforestacionAcumulado md_anno 2024 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.
